name: Cafe Cocoa L'orange
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the confectioners sugar and cocoa together.
2. Beat the cream until fluffy.
3. Gradually add the sifted sugar and cocoa mixture to the cream, continuing to beat until thick.
4. Divide the chocolate whipped cream evenly among 4 coffee cups or mugs.
5. Pour the hot coffee over the cream in each cup.
6. Do not stir the mixture.
7. Top each cup or mug with fresh orange zest.
YIELD: 4 servings
